title: Science Advisory Committee on Health Products Containing Cannabis (SAC-HPCC): Agenda for December 10, 2021 web conference - Canada.ca
content:
## Science Advisory Committee on Health Products Containing Cannabis (SAC-HPCC): Agenda for December 10, 2021 web conference
This web conference will focus on a review and refinement of the first  draft of the CBD safety, efficacy and quality sections of the Committee’s report.
Time Eastern Time  (ET)
Agenda – December 10, 2021 2:00 pm to 5:00 pm ET
Welcome and introductory remarks Presenters:  Committee Co-Chairs Tech verification Meeting recording
